signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +9,799,902 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹23,696
signals.desc: Spot within 0.2% of zero-gamma (23,696). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,775 — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer delta flips at ₹23,775 (0.5% away). Crossing this triggers forced directional hedging — potential for sharp acceleration.

signals.title: Short Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = -117.7Cr. Dealers SHORT gamma: volatility amplification. Expect larger moves; avoid selling naked options.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 22.3%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 22.3% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: PE OI at ₹23,000 growing +22% today (103,826 OI). Strong support floor — sell PE spreads below this level.

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹24,500
signals.desc: CE OI at ₹24,500 growing +15% today (96,644 OI). Strong resistance wall forming — sell CE spreads above this level.
